name: York (United Kingdom)

colors.symbolism: the five gold lions of the city arms

description: A white field bearing the red Cross of St George, charged with five gold lions passant guardant — one on each arm of the cross and one at the centre — the banner of the arms of the City of York.
history: A banner of the civic arms of the City of York: argent, on a cross gules five lions passant guardant or — the red Cross of St George charged with five gold lions. The five lions have featured in the city's arms since the medieval period.

features.symbolism: the Cross of St George of England

features.role: five gold lions passant guardant — one on each arm of the cross and one at the centre
features.symbolism: from the historic arms of the City of York
